zh.Ratho, Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom: 蘇格蘭米德洛迪安奧陳迪尼
zh.Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotl: 英國蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho是Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk的兒子，於大約1470年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波。他和Janet Purves至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他於1540年住在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安奧陳迪尼且於1556年住在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特。他於1540年在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波被列為member of parliament。他去世於大約1560年在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho是Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk的儿子，于大约1470年出生在苏格兰艾丁波。他和Janet Purves至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他于1540年住在苏格兰米德洛迪安奧陳迪尼且于1556年住在英国苏格兰度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特。他于1540年在英国苏格兰艾丁波被列为member of parliament。他去世于大约1560年在苏格兰艾丁波享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marjoribanks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Marchbanks
meanings: Scottish: variant of Marjoribanks, a habitational name from Marjoribanks in Dumfriesshire. Marjoribanks was adopted by a branch of the Johnston family, tenants of the Bruce lords of Annandale. Following the acquisition of lands in the barony of Ratho (Midlothian) by Thomas Marjoribanks, legend developed that the name came from lands granted by Robert Bruce as a marriage portion to his daughter Marjorie (see Margeson ) on her marriage in 1316 to Walter, High Steward of Scotland, ancestor of the royal house of Stewart (Burke).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho was born about 1470, in Edinburgh, Scotland as the son of Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Janet Purves. He lived in Auchendinny, Midlothian, Scotland in 1540 and Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom in 1556. In 1540, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died about 1560, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho est né environ 1470, à Edinburgh, Écosse, fils de Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Janet Purves. Il a vécu à Auchendinny, Midlothian, Écosse en 1540 et à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni en 1556. En 1540, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 1560, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotl: Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho wurde um 1470 in Edinburgh, Scotland, als Sohn von Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk geboren. Er hatte mit Janet Purves mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1540 hat er in Auchendinny, Midlothian, Scotland und 1556 in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom gelebt. 1540 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb um 1560 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Edinburgh, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho è nato il circa 1470 nel Edinburgh, Scotland come figlio di Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Janet Purves. Vissuto a Auchendinny, Midlothian, Scotland nel 1540 e nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito nel 1556. Nel 1540, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì circa 1560, nel Edinburgh, Scotland, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Rathoは約1470年にスコットランドエディンブルグでPhilip Majoribanks of that Ilkの息子として生まれた。彼はJanet Purvesとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1540年にはスコットランドミドロスアンアウチェンディニーに，1556年にはイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトに住んでいた。1540年，イギリススコットランドエディンブルグでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は約1560年にスコットランドエディンブルグで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho(은)는 대략 1470년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Janet Purves(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1540년도에 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 오천딘이에서, 1556년도에 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 살았다. 1540년, 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 대략 1560년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotl: Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Edinburgh, Scotland filho de Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Janet Purves. Ele viveu em Auchendinny, Midlothian, Scotland em 1540 e em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom em 1556. Em 1540, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1560, em Edinburgh, Scotland, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Marjoribanks Lord Of Ratho родился около 1470 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. Его отца звали Philip Majoribanks of that Ilk. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Janet Purves. Он жил в местности аучэнденни, мидлотян, Шотландия в 1540 году и в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в 1556 году. В 1540 году он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер около 1560 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 92 лет.
